renderer.kitty_desc: Kitty Graphics Protocol (experimental — highest quality, original PNG)
renderer.sixel_desc: Sixel (experimental — DEC compatible, wide terminal support)
renderer.braille_desc: Braille (recommended — classic method, all terminals compatible)
guide.index.title: === Tokenmon Guide ===
guide.index.topic_battle: battle        Battle system (win rate, type matchup, XP rewards)
guide.index.topic_region: region        Region system (unlock conditions, level ranges, Pokemon pool)
guide.index.topic_xp: xp            XP / leveling (formula, party share, dispatch bonus)
guide.index.topic_item: item          Items (Poké Ball, drop rates, catching)
guide.battle.title: === Battle Guide ===
guide.battle.encounter_desc1: 15% chance to encounter a wild Pokemon per session start.
guide.battle.encounter_desc2: The party member with the best type matchup fights automatically.
guide.battle.winrate_formula: Win rate = type matchup × level factor × stat factor
guide.battle.winrate_level_note: steep at low levels, flat at high (Lv.51 vs 55 ≈ 37%)
guide.battle.type_grass: Grass → strong vs Water, Ground, Rock
guide.battle.type_fire: Fire → strong vs Grass, Ice, Bug, Steel
guide.battle.type_water: Water → strong vs Fire, Ground, Rock
guide.battle.type_hint: {gray}Full chart: check each Pokemon's type with tokenmon pokedex <name>{reset}
guide.battle.party_desc1: Battle is 1v1, but the whole party's strength adjusts win rate.
guide.battle.party_desc2: Each member's relative power vs the wild Pokemon is calculated → strongest fights
guide.battle.party_desc3: Other members contribute a bonus via geometric series weights (r≈0.337)
guide.battle.reward_win: Win XP = (base 50 + wildLv×3 + rarity bonus) × multiplier
guide.battle.reward_catch: Catch chance on win = determined by each Pokemon's catch rate
guide.battle.reward_rarity: {gray}Rarity bonus: common=0, uncommon=30, rare=80, legendary=200, mythical=500{reset}
guide.region.title: === Region Guide ===
guide.region.move_list: tokenmon region list    List all regions
guide.region.move_cmd: tokenmon region move <name>   Move to region
guide.region.tip1: Higher level region = stronger wild Pokemon = more XP
guide.region.tip2: Each region has a unique Pokemon pool — travel to complete the Pokedex
guide.region.tip3: Champion Road requires 50 catches — legendary Pokemon appear there
guide.achievement.title: === Achievement Guide ===
guide.achievement.check_cmd: tokenmon achievements   Full achievement list with status
guide.achievement.reward_unlock: Pokemon unlock: earn a new Pokemon on specific achievements
guide.achievement.reward_xp: XP bonus: permanent XP multiplier increase (stackable)
guide.achievement.reward_ball: Poké Ball: used to catch wild Pokemon
guide.achievement.reward_slot: Party slot: increase max party size
guide.xp.title: === XP / Leveling Guide ===
guide.xp.gain_desc: Earn XP on battle win (0 on loss)
guide.xp.party_desc1: All party members receive the same XP (not divided — everyone gets full amount).
guide.xp.party_desc2: Even with 6 party members, each receives the full XP.
guide.xp.party_tip: {yellow}Tip: A larger party means training more Pokemon simultaneously{reset}
guide.xp.dispatch_cmd: tokenmon party dispatch <name>  to set dispatch Pokemon
guide.xp.dispatch_desc: Dispatch Pokemon receives 1.5x XP during subagent runs
guide.xp.dispatch_tip: {yellow}Tip: Dispatch lower-level Pokemon for faster growth!{reset}
guide.xp.expgroup_desc1: Each Pokemon has a different exp group (fast, medium_fast, medium_slow, slow, etc.)
guide.xp.expgroup_desc2: Required XP can differ even at the same level
guide.item.title: === Item Guide ===
guide.item.pokeball_desc: A consumable item used to catch wild Pokemon.
guide.item.obtain_achievement: Achievement rewards (first win: 3, Pokedex researcher: 5, win streak master: 10, etc.)
guide.item.catch_desc1: Battle win + uncaught Pokemon + hold Poké Ball → catch (uses 1 ball)
guide.item.catch_desc2: No ball = no catch even on win (Pokedex registered + XP only)
guide.item.catch_desc3: No ball consumed when battling already-caught Pokemon.
guide.item.catch_tip: {yellow}Tip: Stock up on Poké Balls before encountering new Pokemon{reset}
setup.postinstall.title: Tokénmon initial setup...
setup.postinstall.legacy_notice: ℹ Legacy bash data has been migrated.
setup.postinstall.legacy_cleanup: Please clean up the old bash hooks manually.
setup.statusline.wrapper_updated: ✓ tokenmon wrapper updated to latest version

region.locked: This region unlocks after catching/seeing {count} {label} Pokemon.
tier.heated: The tall grass is rustling intensely...
tier.intense: Something seems to be lurking nearby...
tier.legendary: The air is crackling with powerful energy!
tip.volume_xp: Using more tokens at once seems to yield more experience points.
tip.volume_encounter: Wild Pokémon appear more often during longer tasks.
tip.volume_rare: There are rumors that stronger Pokémon appear during complex tasks.
tip.battle_type_advantage: 💡 Type matchups greatly affect win rate! Target weaknesses.
tip.battle_level_matters: 💡 Large level gaps sharply shift win rate (Lv.4 vs Lv.12 = ~17%).
tip.battle_best_pokemon: 💡 The party member with the best type matchup is chosen automatically.
tip.battle_xp_loss: 💡 Losing a battle earns no XP — keep high-level Pokemon in your party!
tip.battle_rare_bonus: 💡 Rarer wild Pokemon give bigger XP bonuses on victory.
tip.region_next_unlock: 🗺️ Discover {remaining} more Pokemon to unlock the next region!
tip.region_current_level: 🗺️ Current region level range: Lv.{minLv}~{maxLv}. Match your party levels.
tip.region_higher_xp: 🗺️ Higher-level regions have stronger wild Pokemon and more XP.
tip.region_champion_road: 🗺️ Champion Road unlocks at 50 catches! Legendary Pokemon await.
tip.region_pool_size: 🗺️ Each region has a unique Pokemon pool. Travel to complete the Pokedex!
tip.achievement_rewards: 🏆 Achievement rewards include Pokemon unlocks, XP bonuses, and party slot expansions.
tip.achievement_session_count: 🏆 Session count achievements: special rewards at 10, 50, and 100 sessions.
tip.achievement_token_milestones: 🏆 Token milestones: Pokemon unlocks at 100k, 500k, 1M, 2M, and 5M tokens!
tip.achievement_pokedex_master: 🏆 Catch 100 species (Pokedex Master) to unlock Arceus!
tip.xp_party_share: ⭐ All party members receive the same XP. A bigger party trains more Pokemon at once!
tip.xp_dispatch_bonus: ⭐ Dispatched Pokemon earn 1.5x XP from subagent runs!
tip.xp_achievement_bonus: ⭐ Unlock permanent XP bonuses through achievements (up to +55%).
tip.xp_weakest_member: ⭐ Dispatch your weakest party member {pokemon} (Lv.{level}) for faster growth.
tip.xp_evolution: ⭐ If a Pokemon is close to evolving, focus XP on it.
tip.item_ball_drop: 🔴 Poké Balls drop 20% on battle win and 5% on battle loss.
tip.item_ball_catch: 🔴 You need a Poké Ball to catch wild Pokemon.
tip.item_ball_count: 🔴 Current Poké Balls: {count}. Get ready for new encounters!
tip.item_achievement_balls: 🔴 Achievement rewards can give you large batches of Poké Balls (up to 10!).
tip.item_ball_strategy: 🔴 Battling already-caught Pokemon does not consume a Poké Ball.
rewards.chain_complete: 🔗 Evolution chain complete! (Poké Ball x{count} received)
rewards.type_master_legendary: ⭐ {count} types mastered! Special legendary group unlocked!
cli.legendary.no_pending: No legendary groups pending. Catch more Pokémon to unlock!
cli.legendary.choose_hint: Usage: tokenmon legendary <number> to select a legendary Pokémon.
